rootCauseCategories.name: Knowledge missing from bundled skill
rootCauseCategories.finding: The v0.6.2 archive lacks post-release quality and composition guidance for seven audited application-generation skills.

rootCauseCategories.name: Knowledge present but too vague
rootCauseCategories.finding: Current skills describe rules but do not include enough concrete page and control templates to force high-quality output.

rootCauseCategories.name: Knowledge present but workflow does not force use
rootCauseCategories.finding: Generation can proceed without proving that every section maps to a concrete, styled, data-bound template.

rootCauseCategories.name: Validator accepts placeholder implementation
rootCauseCategories.finding: Earlier gates accepted structural presence even when runtime UI remained visually weak.

rootCauseCategories.name: No reusable high-quality templates
rootCauseCategories.finding: There is no canonical template library for dashboard headers, KPI cards, forms, Kanban cards, Collection cards, alerts, action bars, and print pages.

rootCauseCategories.name: No golden reference examples
rootCauseCategories.finding: Feature-level studies exist, but no high-quality full app export is used as a golden benchmark.

rootCauseCategories.name: Too much reliance on broad natural-language instruction
rootCauseCategories.finding: Natural-language plans are not enough to produce repeatable package JSON and layout quality.

rootCauseCategories.name: Package-generation fixes distracted from app-quality implementation
rootCauseCategories.finding: Recent cycles optimized import/install correctness before page composition quality.
